approval.question: Goals distilled from spec — approve G1..G6?

note: Cross-vendor spec-gate review via dispatch-diff-review lane over spec.md + goals.md (artifact bytes fed directly — the D6 workaround for untracked artifacts). Verdict: APPROVE, 0 findings, 0 blocking findings. Reviewer verified D1-D7 design soundness, confirmed file:line grounding accuracy (resume.mjs:151/192, bundle.mjs:525, migrate.mjs:176), and confirmed goals evidence the success criteria. Harness degraded: dispatch-tester fallback backend failed; the primary dispatch-diff-review backend succeeded (non-blocking).

Plan-gate cross-vendor review via dispatch-diff-review lane (3 review rounds; artifact bytes fed directly via the D6 diff-param bridge). Final verdict: APPROVE, 0 findings, 0 blocking. Reviewer confirmed: wave dependency ordering correct; same-wave tasks file-disjoint (concurrent-safe); goal coverage G1-G6 honest; foundation wave 0 atomic in practice (wave barrier means no decide runs mid-wave). Two advisory findings folded in across rounds: (1) markTask API in lib/bundle.mjs throws on status==='waived' — waived reachable only via waive-task; (2) upsertTasks never creates waived/waive_reason (appended=always pending, refreshed=preserve existing; index carries no status field). Reviewer's closing: 'the waived-bypass surface is fully closed — waive-task is now the only path that can create status:waived.' Remaining advisory items (doctor/render wave-3 timing, plan.html generated-not-owned, D6/D7 cross-repo E2E) acknowledged as non-blocking in plan.md.

Reconciliation: waves 0-2 (T1-T5) were executed out-of-band — implemented directly by the assistant, verified via the test suite (1400/1400 green), marked done in state.yml, and committed — NOT via the recordWaveResult dispatch path (no qctl producer dispatch), so no wave_recorded events were emitted for these waves. wave_recorded is audit-only: no consumer reads it; task/wave progression is derived from state.tasks. This entry reconciles the event trail so a reader is not confused by the jump from plan_adversary_review to present. Commits: wave0 fe3022d (T1-T3 foundation), wave1 742dedb (T4 waive-task), wave2 5f62913 (T5 amend-tasks).

Reconciliation (waves 3-5): like waves 0-2 (see the earlier reconciliation note), waves 3-5 (T6-T10) were executed out-of-band — assistant-implemented, suite-verified (1405/1405 green), state.yml-marked, and committed — NOT via the recordWaveResult dispatch path, so no wave_recorded events were emitted for them either. wave_recorded remains audit-only (no consumer reads it; task/wave progression derives from state.tasks). Commits: wave3 d4a19fb (T6 doctor state-schema checks + T7 render badges); wave4 ab878d5 (T9 masterplan sequencer gate-bytes prose — T8 D7 content path is cross-repo in agent-dispatch packages/core/review.mjs, committed f0b2398); wave5 T10 (CHANGELOG/docs/verbs.md/docs/internals.md + full-suite + doctor verification + this note) lands in the same commit as this entry. Run complete: T1-T10 done, G6 (green + documented), G5 (review.adversary armed) no-regression, mp doctor 0 errors.
summary: waves 3-5 reconciled (out-of-band execution documented); run complete
